purpose: Ship the agent-facing method layer - the elicitation and build-cycle playbooks, the reference docs and the harness fragment - that teaches an AI agent how to run the RCF method well, served over MCP as resources and prompts and readable in place under guidance/.
responsibilities: Carry the elicitation method (question frames, AC-depth bar, deploy-target elicitation, hosting-choice guidance) the eliciting agent runs with a human
Carry the build-cycle method (five stages, local-preview default outcome, runtime-provenance discipline, interim self-review) the operating agent runs per FBS
Carry the harness fragment rcf init writes into CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md, whose RULE blocks foreclose observed failure modes
Keep every shipped claim, verb and channel address mechanically agreed with the tool via the drift tests
internalStructure: Static markdown files under guidance/, indexed by guidance/manifest.json which maps each file to one canonical MCP address (resources for reference docs, prompts for the playbooks). The harness fragment is a fenced block in harness-template.md that src/setup extracts and writes into agent-instructions files. Drift tests (test/guidance) assert content-and-inventory invariants so the pack and the tool cannot silently diverge.

interfaces.name: rcf_elicit_requirements
interfaces.description: The elicitation playbook, served as an MCP prompt to the eliciting agent.

interfaces.name: rcf_execute_build_cycle
interfaces.description: The build-cycle playbook, served as an MCP prompt to the operating agent.

interfaces.name: harness fragment
interfaces.description: The RULE-bearing block rcf init writes into CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.

dependencies.name: MCP server
dependencies.description: Serves the pack's docs as resources and playbooks as prompts over local stdio.

dependencies.name: Build adapter
dependencies.description: The build-cycle method the pack teaches is executed against the bundles the build adapter assembles.

tradeoffs: The pack is prose served to a model, not enforced code: it can teach a property (local preview, provenance labelling) but cannot mechanically compel it the way a schema compels document shape. Drift tests hold the pack honest against the tool's verbs and inventory; the method's behavioural properties are held by the RULE blocks and the ACs that require them, not by a runtime gate. The productised independent gate is out of scope here (see ADR-009).
notes: Modelled as a component for the first time by the Tier-1 hardening set; the pack existed and shipped before this TAC captured it.
name: Agent guidance pack
